description: §52.15 — a server-authority read route that GATES via default-inherit (the cell has no auth= opt-out, so it inherits the enclosing <program auth="required">) fires no W-SERVERLOAD-UNGATED. The clean control: the route is gated, so it is not anonymously reachable.
rationale: §52.15: with no per-var auth opt-out the serverLoad route default-inherits auth="required", so the route is gated and W-SERVERLOAD-UNGATED does not fire. (Row-scoped by ${@currentUser.id} → I-SSR-AUTH-SCOPED-CLIENT-HYDRATED also stays silent — the cell is SSR-seeded, not auto-omitted.)
